home.descLine1: Protect upstream servers with precise concurrency control.
home.descLine2: Simple, lightweight, built on ES2024 resource management.

features.title: Features
features.concurrencyDesc: Limit the number of simultaneous upstream connections. New requests queue automatically when the limit is reached.
features.zeroConfigDesc: One environment variable to start. Sensible defaults for port (8080), concurrency (5), and timeout (120s).
features.transparentProxyDesc: Forwards headers, handles request bodies, streams responses back. Full HTTP proxy with rate limiting.
features.timeoutDesc: Configurable request timeout with proper 504 responses. Prevents hung connections from consuming resources.

cta.title: Get Started
cta.desc: Protect your upstream servers in one command.
